system.description: The Berserker calls something older than language — a controlled letting-go of the part of the mind that flinches. The world narrows. Pain becomes information. For a minute, almost nothing on the field can move you.
system.effect: Enter Rage as a bonus action: +2 to Strength checks and resist physical damage for 1 minute.

wizard.tagline: Let go of the part of you that flinches
